metadata.description: Compound V3 (Comet) is a lending protocol that operates isolated markets for individual base assets (USDC, USDT, WETH), each accepting a curated set of collateral tokens. Unlike Compound V2's shared-pool model, V3 isolates risk per market: suppliers lend a single base asset and borrowers post collateral against it. All three Ethereum markets are upgradeable EIP-1967 proxies controlled by a Compound governance Timelock with a 48-hour delay, with $834.07M in total capital at risk across all admin-controlled contracts. The protocol depends on Chainlink price feeds and a ConstantPriceFeed for USDT pricing.

admins.name: CometProxyAdmin
admins.description: Immutable proxy admin contract owned by the Governance Timelock. Can upgrade, deploy-and-upgrade, and change the admin of the three market proxy contracts (cUSDCv3, cUSDTv3, cWETHv3) via upgrade, upgradeAndCall, deployAndUpgradeTo, deployUpgradeToAndCall, and changeProxyAdmin. Controls $834.07M in direct capital across the three market contracts.

admins.name: Compound Governance Timelock (48h)
admins.description: Central admin of the protocol with a 48-hour execution delay. Controls 40 permissioned functions across 10 contracts, including all market parameter changes (interest rates, collateral factors, supply caps, reserve targets), asset listing via addAsset/updateAsset, price feed configuration, factory and extension delegate settings, governor transfer, and reserve withdrawals via withdrawReserves and approveThis. Also owns the CometProxyAdmin, giving it indirect upgrade authority over all three market proxies. Governed by CompoundGovernor, which routes COMP token holder votes through this timelock. Controls $0 in direct capital exposure.

admins.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
admins.description: The zero address appears as pendingAdmin on the Timelock, indicating no pending admin transfer is in progress. This permission is effectively inactive.

admins.name: CompoundGovernor
admins.description: Upgradeable on-chain governance contract (EIP-1967 proxy) that serves as the admin of the Timelock. COMP token holders submit and vote on proposals, which are then queued and executed through the Timelock with a 48-hour delay. The governor contract itself is upgradeable via a separate ProxyAdmin also owned by the Timelock, meaning governance can upgrade its own governor implementation.

dependencies.name: ConstantPriceFeed (USDT)
dependencies.description: An immutable contract that returns a constant price, used as the base token price feed for the cUSDTv3 market. Referenced by 9 functions including absorb, buyCollateral, transfer, supply, and withdraw. Since USDT is the base asset, a constant $1 price avoids oracle dependency for the base token itself.

dependencies.name: Wrapped Ether (WETH)
dependencies.description: The WETH token contract, used as collateral in the cUSDTv3 market. Referenced by 8 functions including buyCollateral, supply, supplyFrom, and withdraw. WETH is immutable and has no admin controls.

dependencies.name: Chainlink 4/9 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 4-of-9 Gnosis Safe that owns the Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy. Can change the underlying aggregator address, which would affect all price-dependent operations in the cUSDCv3 market. This is a standard Chainlink operations multisig.

dependencies.name: Circle USDC Token
dependencies.description: The USDC stablecoin contract, which is the base asset of the cUSDCv3 market. It is an upgradeable ZeppelinOS proxy controlled by Circle. Used in 9 functions including approveThis, buyCollateral, supply, and withdraw. Circle can freeze, blacklist, or upgrade the USDC contract, which would directly impact the cUSDCv3 market.

funds.name: cUSDCv3 Market
funds.description: The main Compound V3 USDC lending market. Holds $686.54M in deposited assets including USDC (base), WBTC, wstETH, WETH, LINK, UNI, COMP, cbBTC, weETH, tBTC, and rsETH collateral. This is the largest Compound V3 market by TVL.

funds.name: cUSDTv3 Market
funds.description: The Compound V3 USDT lending market. Holds $147.53M in deposited assets including USDT (base), wstETH, ezETH, WETH, rsETH, weETH, tETH, and other ETH-derivative collateral tokens.

funds.name: COMP Governance Token
funds.description: The Compound governance token used for voting in CompoundGovernor proposals. Has a market capitalization of $214.30M.

changes.before: Exit point or burner of USDC on this chain for the Gateway protocol.

governance.votingProcess: Proposals execute arbitrary calls via Timelock. 400k COMP quorum; For votes must exceed Against and meet quorum to pass.
